title: App log stays empty no matter what
description_md:
The `paymentd` app is definitely handling requests, but its log file `/var/log/paymentd/paymentd.log` is always empty — so nobody can debug the failures customers are reporting. Someone once 'fixed a disk-space alert' by pointing the log somewhere. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find out why writes to the log go nowhere, and restore real logging.

You're done when a line written through the app's logger actually shows up in `/var/log/paymentd/paymentd.log`.
